text:
is an audio drama published by on 01 December 1996. Side A has a runtime of 13:31 minutes and it focuses on Shinji Ikari. Side B has a runtime of 17:57 minutes and it focuses on Asuka Langley Sohryu.

It features the characters, voiced by Megumi Ogata and Yuko Miyamura, recording messages to the listener, like a "good morning" and "happy birthday" message, while the other comments on the messages, and they discuss each other, their relationship, and some events of the series that happened between them. It is a lighthearted humorous recording.

Despite the "04" number, this is actually part of a multi-franchise series by Movic, and the "Shinji & Asuka Version" is the only release related to Evangelion. VGMDB Page Mandarake search
